value.found_quote: Tracing is built into the Agents SDK and is enabled by default in the normal server-side SDK path. Every run can emit a structured record of model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans, which you can inspect in the [Traces dashboard](https://platform.openai.com/traces).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes built-in tracing in the Agents SDK that emits a structured record of model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans, viewable in a Traces dashboard — matching the claim. It is described as enabled by default (active).
